name: ParallaxLayer
summary: A child layer inside a `ParallaxScroll` that moves at a fractional `speed` (1 = native, <1 slower, >1 faster) along `axis`; stack several at different speeds for depth — displacement neutralizes under reduced-motion.

props.name: data-valet-component
props.description:
Override the root component-identity marker (defaults to `'ParallaxLayer'`).
ParallaxBackground passes its own name so the DOM node identifies as it.

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`
